query:
INSERT INTO artisans (userId, categoryId, businessName, profession, bio, phone, email, address, city, state, country, latitude, longitude, priceMin, priceMax, currency, isAvailable, isVerified, status, yearsExperience, avgRating, totalReviews, totalBookings, services, languages, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT
  u.id,
  a.categoryId,
  a.businessName,
  a.profession,
  a.bio,
  a.phone,
  a.email,
  a.address,
  a.city,
  a.state,
  'Ghana',
  a.latitude,
  a.longitude,
  a.priceMin,
  a.priceMax,
  'GHS',
  a.isAvailable,
  a.isVerified,
  'approved',
  a.yearsExperience,
  a.avgRating,
  a.totalReviews,
  a.totalBookings,
  a.services,
  a.languages,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM users u
JOIN (
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-001' AS openId, 1 AS categoryId, 'Asante Fine Woodworks' AS businessName, 'Master Carpenter' AS profession,
    'Specialist in custom furniture, kitchen cabinets, and wooden doors. Over 12 years crafting quality pieces for homes and offices across Accra. I use locally sourced hardwoods and modern finishing techniques.' AS bio,
    '+233 24 123 4567' AS phone, 'kwame.asante@gmail.com' AS email,
    '14 Ring Road Central, Accra' AS address, 'Accra' AS city, 'Greater Accra' AS state,
    5.5502 AS latitude, -0.2174 AS longitude,
    800 AS priceMin, 5000 AS priceMax, 1 AS isAvailable, 1 AS isVerified, 12 AS yearsExperience,
    4.8 AS avgRating, 47 AS totalReviews, 63 AS totalBookings,
    '["Custom Furniture","Kitchen Cabinets","Wooden Doors","Wardrobes","Office Desks"]' AS services,
    '["English","Twi"]' AS languages
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-002', 2, 'Mensah Electrical Services', 'Certified Electrician',
    'Licensed electrician with 8 years experience in residential and commercial wiring, solar panel installation, and electrical fault diagnosis. Available for emergency callouts 24/7 in Accra and Tema.',
    '+233 20 987 6543', 'abena.mensah@gmail.com',
    '7 Spintex Road, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.6200, -0.1500, 1, 1, 8,
    300, 2500, 1, 1, 8,
    4.7, 38, 55,
    '["Wiring & Rewiring","Solar Installation","Fault Diagnosis","Security Lighting","Generator Setup"]',
    '["English","Twi","Ga"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-003', 3, 'Kofi Plumbing & Sanitation', 'Master Plumber',
    'Expert plumber handling pipe installations, bathroom fittings, borehole connections, and drainage systems. Serving East Legon, Adenta, and surrounding areas. Fast response guaranteed.',
    '+233 55 246 8101', 'kofi.boateng@gmail.com',
    '23 Adenta Road, Adenta', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.6800, -0.1600, 1, 1, 10,
    250, 2000, 1, 1, 10,
    4.6, 29, 41,
    '["Pipe Installation","Bathroom Fitting","Borehole Connection","Drainage Systems","Leak Repair"]',
    '["English","Twi"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-004', 4, 'Ama Fashion House', 'Master Tailor & Fashion Designer',
    'Award-winning fashion designer specialising in Kente-inspired modern wear, corporate attire, and traditional Ghanaian outfits. Custom measurements taken at your location. Bridal packages available.',
    '+233 26 112 3344', 'ama.owusu@gmail.com',
    '5 Osu Oxford Street, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.5558, -0.1831, 1, 1, 15,
    150, 1500, 1, 1, 15,
    4.9, 62, 88,
    '["Kente Outfits","Corporate Wear","Bridal Gowns","Alterations","School Uniforms"]',
    '["English","Twi","Ewe"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-005', 5, 'Darko Auto Garage', 'Auto Mechanic & Diagnostics',
    'Qualified mechanic with expertise in Toyota, Hyundai, and Kia vehicles. Specialising in engine overhaul, AC repair, and computerised diagnostics. Workshop located near Tema Motorway.',
    '+233 27 555 7788', 'yaw.darko@gmail.com',
    '45 Tema Motorway, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.6350, -0.0900, 1, 1, 9,
    200, 3000, 1, 1, 9,
    4.5, 33, 47,
    '["Engine Overhaul","AC Repair","Diagnostics","Brake Service","Oil Change"]',
    '["English","Twi"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-006', 6, 'Frimpong Painting & Decor', 'Interior & Exterior Painter',
    'Professional painter offering interior and exterior painting, wallpaper installation, and decorative finishes. Uses eco-friendly paints. Free colour consultation included with every job.',
    '+233 24 667 8899', 'akosua.frimpong@gmail.com',
    '18 Labone Street, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.5700, -0.1700, 1, 1, 7,
    500, 8000, 1, 1, 7,
    4.7, 24, 36,
    '["Interior Painting","Exterior Painting","Wallpaper","Decorative Finishes","Waterproofing"]',
    '["English","Twi","Fante"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-007', 7, 'Amponsah Welding Works', 'Welder & Metal Fabricator',
    'Skilled welder and metal fabricator producing gates, burglar-proof windows, steel furniture, and industrial equipment. Serving construction companies and private clients across Greater Accra.',
    '+233 50 334 5566', 'kwesi.amponsah@gmail.com',
    '9 Industrial Area, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.5900, -0.2300, 1, 1, 11,
    400, 6000, 1, 1, 11,
    4.6, 19, 28,
    '["Steel Gates","Burglar Proofing","Steel Furniture","Railings","Industrial Fabrication"]',
    '["English","Twi"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-008', 8, 'Efua Tiles & Flooring', 'Tiler & Flooring Specialist',
    'Expert tiler with 6 years experience in ceramic, porcelain, and marble tile installation. Bathroom renovations, kitchen backsplashes, and full floor tiling. Competitive rates and clean workmanship.',
    '+233 23 778 9900', 'efua.agyeman@gmail.com',
    '33 Dansoman Highway, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.5400, -0.2500, 1, 1, 6,
    300, 4000, 1, 1, 6,
    4.4, 21, 30,
    '["Floor Tiling","Bathroom Tiling","Kitchen Backsplash","Marble Installation","Grouting & Sealing"]',
    '["English","Twi","Ga"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-009', 9, 'Adjei Roofing & Construction', 'Roofer & Building Contractor',
    'Experienced roofer and building contractor handling roof installation, repairs, waterproofing, and general construction. Licensed by Ghana Building Authority. Projects completed on time and within budget.',
    '+233 28 445 6677', 'nana.adjei@gmail.com',
    '67 Achimota Road, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.6100, -0.2200, 1, 1, 14,
    1000, 20000, 1, 1, 14,
    4.8, 16, 22,
    '["Roof Installation","Roof Repair","Waterproofing","Ceiling Works","General Construction"]',
    '["English","Twi","Dagbani"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-010', 10, 'Amoah AC & Refrigeration', 'AC Technician & Refrigeration Engineer',
    'Certified air conditioning and refrigeration technician. Installation, servicing, and repair of split units, central AC, and commercial refrigeration equipment. Brands: LG, Samsung, Midea, Daikin.',
    '+233 54 223 4455', 'adwoa.amoah@gmail.com',
    '12 North Kaneshie, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.5750, -0.2450, 1, 1, 8,
    200, 3500, 1, 1, 8,
    4.7, 35, 52,
    '["AC Installation","AC Servicing","AC Repair","Refrigerator Repair","Cold Room Maintenance"]',
    '["English","Twi","Fante"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-011', 1, 'Appiah Aluminium Works', 'Aluminium Fabricator',
    'Specialist in aluminium window frames, sliding doors, shop fronts, and curtain walling. Custom designs to suit any architectural style. Serving Kumasi and Greater Accra regions.',
    '+233 24 889 0011', 'kojo.appiah@gmail.com',
    '88 Kumasi Road, Kumasi', 'Kumasi', 'Ashanti',
    6.6885, -1.6244, 1, 1, 10,
    600, 8000, 1, 1, 10,
    4.5, 28, 39,
    '["Aluminium Windows","Sliding Doors","Shop Fronts","Curtain Walling","Louvre Blades"]',
    '["English","Twi","Asante Twi"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-012', 4, 'Serwaa Kente Designs', 'Kente Weaver & Traditional Clothier',
    'Third-generation Kente weaver from Bonwire, Kumasi. Producing authentic hand-woven Kente cloth for weddings, festivals, and export. Custom patterns and colours available. Wholesale orders welcome.',
    '+233 20 556 7788', 'maame.serwaa@gmail.com',
    '3 Bonwire Road, Kumasi', 'Kumasi', 'Ashanti',
    6.7200, -1.5900, 1, 1, 20,
    200, 3000, 1, 1, 20,
    4.9, 54, 71,
    '["Hand-woven Kente","Wedding Kente","Festival Cloth","Custom Patterns","Wholesale Supply"]',
    '["English","Asante Twi","Twi"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-013', 2, 'Quaye Solar Solutions', 'Solar Energy Technician',
    'Renewable energy specialist offering solar panel installation, battery storage systems, and inverter setup for homes and businesses. Certified by Ghana Energy Commission. Serving Cape Coast and Accra.',
    '+233 27 334 5566', 'fiifi.quaye@gmail.com',
    '22 Cape Coast Road, Cape Coast', 'Cape Coast', 'Central',
    5.1037, -1.2827, 1, 1, 6,
    2000, 15000, 1, 1, 6,
    4.8, 18, 25,
    '["Solar Installation","Battery Storage","Inverter Setup","Solar Maintenance","Energy Audit"]',
    '["English","Fante","Twi"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-014', 3, 'Baffoe Borehole Services', 'Borehole Driller & Water Systems',
    'Licensed borehole drilling contractor with heavy equipment for residential and commercial projects. Water quality testing, pump installation, and overhead tank setup. Operating across all 16 regions of Ghana.',
    '+233 55 667 8899', 'akua.baffoe@gmail.com',
    '45 Liberation Road, Accra', 'Accra', 'Greater Accra',
    5.5950, -0.1850, 1, 1, 13,
    5000, 25000, 1, 1, 13,
    4.6, 12, 17,
    '["Borehole Drilling","Pump Installation","Water Quality Testing","Overhead Tank","Pipe Laying"]',
    '["English","Twi","Dagbani"]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-015', 5, 'Tetteh Mobile Mechanics', 'Mobile Auto Mechanic',
    'Convenient mobile mechanic service — I come to you! Specialising in roadside repairs, routine servicing, and pre-purchase vehicle inspections. Covering all of Accra and Tema. Call for same-day service.',
    '+233 26 778 9900', 'kwabena.tetteh@gmail.com',
    '10 Tema Community 1, Tema', 'Tema', 'Greater Accra',
    5.6698, -0.0166, 1, 1, 7,
    150, 2000, 1, 1, 7,
    4.7, 41, 58,
    '["Roadside Repair","Routine Servicing","Vehicle Inspection","Tyre Change","Battery Replacement"]',
    '["English","Twi","Ga"]'
) a ON u.openId = a.openId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v2rtyvakpdweLV.ab2e18363cdc --database WP54uqojT2hdzD6eefaKhT --execute

logs: ERROR 1222 (21000) at line 2: The used SELECT statements have a different number of columns
